ddls:
CREATE TABLE "acoustic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acoustic data entry */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target value for the acoustic parameter being predicted */,
  "prediction" INTEGER /* Predicted value using the default algorithm */,
  "prediction_srpphat" REAL /* Predicted value using the SRPPHAT algorithm */,
  "prediction_music" INTEGER /* Predicted value using the MUSIC algorithm */,
  "t60" TEXT /* Reverberation Time (T60) value */,
  "snr" TEXT /* Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) value */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of the acoustic signal (e.g., speech, music) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used for prediction */,
  "raw_signal_data" TEXT /* Raw acoustic signal data */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Description of the environment where the data was collected */,
  "microphone_model" TEXT /* Model of the microphone used to collect the data */,
  "microphone_position" TEXT /* Position of the microphone in the environment */,
  "processing_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to process the acoustic data (in milliseconds) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acoustic_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acoustic_data_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acoustic_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., conference room, auditorium, outdoor) */,
  "microphone_count" INTEGER /* Number of microphones in the location */,
  "microphone_models" TEXT /* List of microphone models used in the location */,
  "acoustic_properties" TEXT /* JSON field to store acoustic properties of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the algorithm (e.g., 95.0 for 95%) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store parameters used by the algorithm */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data used to develop the algorithm */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON field to store performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, technician) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
